signals.raw:
Interactive Brokers Opens Solana (SOL) Trading to European Investors | YES | MED confidence**  
This announcement expands access via Zero Hash on one of the world's largest brokerage platforms, amid SOL's 167 million monthly token holders and Symbiosis protocol activity on Raydium[3]. signals.headline: Solana Hits All-Time Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders, 148 Million Daily Non-Vote Transactions | YES | HIGH conf
signals.raw:
Solana Hits All-Time Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders, 148 Million Daily Non-Vote Transactions | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Network activity surges as of April 14, 2026, bolstered by anticipated Alpenglow upgrade slashing finality to 150ms from 12s, plus BlackRock/Fidelity SOL ETF holdings[1]. Institutional interest grows despite consolidation[1][3].
